title: ligeophila bicornuta
intro: Ligeophila bicornuta, also known as the two-horned Ligeophila, is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Ligeophila bicornuta is traditionally prepared as a tea or tincture, and its health benefits are believed to include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting immune function.
